testcase.name: Authentication — form tests (no session needed) › TC-AUTH-03: empty form shows validation
Authentication — form tests (no session needed) › TC-AUTH-04: email filled but no password shows validation
Authentication — form tests (no session needed) › TC-AUTH-05: password filled but no email shows validation
Authentication — form tests (no session needed) › TC-AUTH-06: show password reveals password text
Authentication — form tests (no session needed) › TC-AUTH-07: toggle password twice restores masked input
Authentication — form tests (no session needed) › TC-AUTH-08: unauthenticated access to /app/home redirects to login
Authentication — requires login › TC-AUTH-01: successful login redirects to /app/home
Authentication — requires login › TC-AUTH-02: wrong password shows error message
Authentication — session tests › TC-AUTH-09: session persists after page reload
Authentication — session tests › TC-AUTH-10: logout clears session and redirects to login
Forgot Password › TC-AUTH-11: forgot password link is visible on the login page
Forgot Password › TC-AUTH-12: clicking forgot password link opens the password reset form
Forgot Password › TC-AUTH-13: password reset form has an email input field
Forgot Password › TC-AUTH-14: submitting the reset form with a valid email shows a confirmation or success message
Forgot Password › TC-AUTH-15: back to login link is present on the reset password form
Social Login › TC-AUTH-16: Google or OAuth social login button is visible on login page
Social Login › TC-AUTH-17: Facebook or additional OAuth button is visible on login page
Social Login › TC-AUTH-18: clicking a social login button initiates a redirect or opens a popup
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-19: sign up link or button is visible from the login page
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-20: clicking sign up navigates to or opens a signup form
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-21: signup form has a name field
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-22: signup form has an email field
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-23: signup form has a password field
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-24: signup form shows a password strength indicator when typing
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-25: submitting the signup form creates an account or shows a confirmation
Security › TC-AUTH-26: multiple wrong password attempts show a lockout message or CAPTCHA
Security › TC-AUTH-27: remember me checkbox is present on the login form
Security › TC-AUTH-28: remember me checkbox can be toggled on and off
TC-NEWS | Page Load › TC-NEWS-01: navigates to the correct news URL
TC-NEWS | Page Load › TC-NEWS-02: news heading is visible
TC-NEWS | Page Load › TC-NEWS-03: main content region is visible
TC-NEWS | Page Load › TC-NEWS-04: page has no uncaught JS errors on load
TC-NEWS | Feed Rendering › TC-NEWS-05: news feed renders at least one article or card
TC-NEWS | Feed Rendering › TC-NEWS-06: article card shows a headline
TC-NEWS | Feed Rendering › TC-NEWS-07: article card shows a thumbnail image
TC-NEWS | Feed Rendering › TC-NEWS-08: article card shows a source name
TC-NEWS | Feed Rendering › TC-NEWS-09: article card shows a publication date or timestamp
TC-NEWS | Feed Rendering › TC-NEWS-10: multiple article cards are rendered
TC-NEWS | Category Tabs › TC-NEWS-11: category tab bar or filter is present
TC-NEWS | Category Tabs › TC-NEWS-12: default active tab is visually selected (aria-selected or data-state)
TC-NEWS | Category Tabs › TC-NEWS-13: switching to a second category tab changes articles
TC-NEWS | Category Tabs › TC-NEWS-14: clicking Technology category (if present) loads tech articles
TC-NEWS | Category Tabs › TC-NEWS-15: active tab is highlighted after switching
TC-NEWS | Article Detail › TC-NEWS-16: clicking an article opens detail or external link
TC-NEWS | Article Detail › TC-NEWS-17: article detail page shows readable content
TC-NEWS | Article Detail › TC-NEWS-18: back navigation returns to news feed
TC-NEWS | Article Detail › TC-NEWS-19: article source is a clickable link
TC-NEWS | Share and Bookmark › TC-NEWS-20: share button is present on article card
TC-NEWS | Share and Bookmark › TC-NEWS-21: share button opens share menu or dialog
TC-NEWS | Share and Bookmark › TC-NEWS-22: bookmark or save button is present
TC-NEWS | Search › TC-NEWS-23: search input is accessible
TC-NEWS | Search › TC-NEWS-24: typing in search returns results or filters feed
TC-NEWS | Search › TC-NEWS-25: clearing search restores default feed
TC-NEWS | Load More / Infinite Scroll › TC-NEWS-26: "Load more" button or infinite scroll is present
TC-NEWS | Load More / Infinite Scroll › TC-NEWS-27: scrolling down does not crash the page
TC-NEWS | Breaking News and Empty State › TC-NEWS-28: breaking news banner renders if present
TC-NEWS | Breaking News and Empty State › TC-NEWS-29: selecting an empty category shows empty state message
TC-NEWS | Breaking News and Empty State › TC-NEWS-30: page does not throw JS errors on category switch
TC-NEWS | Save and Bookmark Article › TC-NEWS-31: save or bookmark button is present on article card
TC-NEWS | Save and Bookmark Article › TC-NEWS-32: clicking bookmark toggles its saved state
TC-NEWS | Personalized Feed Preferences › TC-NEWS-33: personalized feed toggle or preferences control is present
TC-NEWS | Reading Time Estimate › TC-NEWS-34: reading time estimate is shown on article card
TC-NEWS | Related Articles › TC-NEWS-35: related articles section is present on article detail
TC-NEWS | Related Articles › TC-NEWS-36: related articles section contains at least one article link
TC-NEWS | Manage Sources › TC-NEWS-37: manage sources link is accessible
TC-WEATHER: Page Load and Layout › TC-WEATHER-01: weather page loads at correct URL
TC-WEATHER: Page Load and Layout › TC-WEATHER-02: main content area is visible
TC-WEATHER: Page Load and Layout › TC-WEATHER-03: weather heading or title is visible
TC-WEATHER: Page Load and Layout › TC-WEATHER-04: weather page has rendered child elements
TC-WEATHER: Current Weather Widget › TC-WEATHER-05: current weather widget or section is present
TC-WEATHER: Current Weather Widget › TC-WEATHER-06: temperature value with degree symbol is displayed
TC-WEATHER: Current Weather Widget › TC-WEATHER-07: weather condition text is displayed
TC-WEATHER: Current Weather Widget › TC-WEATHER-08: location name or city is displayed
TC-WEATHER: Current Weather Widget › TC-WEATHER-09: humidity metric is shown
TC-WEATHER: Current Weather Widget › TC-WEATHER-10: wind speed metric is shown
TC-WEATHER: Current Weather Widget › TC-WEATHER-11: weather icon or illustration is present
TC-WEATHER: Forecasts › TC-WEATHER-12: hourly forecast section renders
TC-WEATHER: Forecasts › TC-WEATHER-13: multi-day forecast section renders
TC-WEATHER: Forecasts › TC-WEATHER-14: forecast cards show day labels
TC-WEATHER: Forecasts › TC-WEATHER-15: forecast cards show high and low temperatures
TC-WEATHER: Location Controls › TC-WEATHER-16: location search field is present
TC-WEATHER: Location Controls › TC-WEATHER-17: typing a city in location search returns results
TC-WEATHER: Location Controls › TC-WEATHER-18: selecting a city from results updates the weather display
TC-WEATHER: Location Controls › TC-WEATHER-19: use current location button is present
TC-WEATHER: Temperature Unit Toggle › TC-WEATHER-20: temperature unit toggle (°C/°F) is present
TC-WEATHER: Temperature Unit Toggle › TC-WEATHER-21: clicking unit toggle switches temperature display
TC-WEATHER: Alerts and Metadata › TC-WEATHER-22: weather alerts section is present if alerts exist
TC-WEATHER: Alerts and Metadata › TC-WEATHER-23: last updated timestamp is visible
TC-WEATHER: Alerts and Metadata › TC-WEATHER-24: weather data loads within acceptable time
TC-WEATHER: Alerts and Metadata › TC-WEATHER-25: weather page does not show unhandled error state
TC-MEETINGS: Page Load and Layout › TC-MEETINGS-01: page loads at the correct URL
TC-MEETINGS: Page Load and Layout › TC-MEETINGS-02: meetings heading is visible
TC-MEETINGS: Page Load and Layout › TC-MEETINGS-03: main content area renders with children
TC-MEETINGS: Page Load and Layout › TC-MEETINGS-04: page does not surface a JS error overlay
TC-MEETINGS: Meeting List or Calendar View › TC-MEETINGS-05: meeting list or calendar container renders
TC-MEETINGS: Meeting List or Calendar View › TC-MEETINGS-06: upcoming meetings section or label is visible
TC-MEETINGS: Meeting List or Calendar View › TC-MEETINGS-07: meeting card or list item renders (or empty state shows)
TC-MEETINGS: Meeting List or Calendar View › TC-MEETINGS-08: meeting card shows a title or name
TC-MEETINGS: Meeting List or Calendar View › TC-MEETINGS-09: meeting card shows date and/or time
TC-MEETINGS: Meeting List or Calendar View › TC-MEETINGS-10: meeting card shows host or participant info
TC-MEETINGS: Create / Schedule Meeting › TC-MEETINGS-11: Create or Schedule Meeting button is visible
TC-MEETINGS: Create / Schedule Meeting › TC-MEETINGS-12: clicking Create Meeting opens a form or modal
TC-MEETINGS: Create / Schedule Meeting › TC-MEETINGS-13: create meeting form has a title field
TC-MEETINGS: Create / Schedule Meeting › TC-MEETINGS-14: date picker is present and opens on click
TC-MEETINGS: Create / Schedule Meeting › TC-MEETINGS-15: participants field accepts an email or username
TC-MEETINGS: Create / Schedule Meeting › TC-MEETINGS-16: meeting privacy selector is present (public/private)
TC-MEETINGS: Create / Schedule Meeting › TC-MEETINGS-17: cancel button closes the create meeting form
TC-MEETINGS: Join Meeting › TC-MEETINGS-18: Join Meeting button is visible on a scheduled meeting card
TC-MEETINGS: Join Meeting › TC-MEETINGS-19: clicking Join triggers navigation or opens video UI
TC-MEETINGS: Join Meeting › TC-MEETINGS-20: Copy Meeting Link button is present on a card
TC-MEETINGS: Meeting Detail › TC-MEETINGS-21: clicking a meeting card navigates to detail or opens a panel
TC-MEETINGS: Meeting Detail › TC-MEETINGS-22: meeting detail shows meeting title
TC-MEETINGS: Meeting Detail › TC-MEETINGS-23: edit meeting option is present for own meetings
TC-MEETINGS: Meeting Detail › TC-MEETINGS-24: delete or cancel meeting option is accessible
TC-MEETINGS: Meeting Detail › TC-MEETINGS-25: delete action shows a confirmation prompt
TC-MEETINGS: Past Meetings and Filters › TC-MEETINGS-26: past meetings section or history tab is accessible
TC-MEETINGS: Past Meetings and Filters › TC-MEETINGS-27: switching to past meetings tab updates the list
TC-MEETINGS: Past Meetings and Filters › TC-MEETINGS-28: switching to upcoming filter restores upcoming list
TC-MEETINGS: Past Meetings and Filters › TC-MEETINGS-29: empty state renders gracefully when no past meetings exist
TC-MEETINGS: Accessibility and Edge Cases › TC-MEETINGS-30: action buttons are keyboard focusable
TC-MEETINGS: Accessibility and Edge Cases › TC-MEETINGS-31: meetings page survives a hard reload without JS error
TC-MEETINGS: Accessibility and Edge Cases › TC-MEETINGS-32: navigating away and back retains the meetings page structure
TC-MEETINGS: Recurring Meetings › TC-MEETINGS-33: recurring toggle is present in the create meeting form
TC-MEETINGS: Recurring Meetings › TC-MEETINGS-34: frequency selector (daily/weekly/monthly) is present when recurring is enabled
TC-MEETINGS: Recurring Meetings › TC-MEETINGS-35: end date field is present for recurring meetings
TC-MEETINGS: In-Meeting Controls › TC-MEETINGS-36: video and audio toggle buttons are present after joining
TC-MEETINGS: In-Meeting Controls › TC-MEETINGS-37: screen share button is present in meeting controls
TC-MEETINGS: In-Meeting Controls › TC-MEETINGS-38: chat panel toggle button is present in meeting controls
TC-MEETINGS: In-Meeting Controls › TC-MEETINGS-39: end call button is present in meeting controls
TC-MEETINGS: In-Meeting Controls › TC-MEETINGS-40: participant count is visible during a meeting
TC-MEETINGS: Calendar Export › TC-MEETINGS-41: add to calendar button is present on a meeting card
TC-MEETINGS: Calendar Export › TC-MEETINGS-42: clicking add to calendar triggers .ics download or calendar app prompt
Page Load and Layout › TC-ORBIT-01: page loads at the correct URL
Page Load and Layout › TC-ORBIT-02: Orbit heading is visible
Page Load and Layout › TC-ORBIT-03: main content area renders with child elements
Page Load and Layout › TC-ORBIT-04: sidebar or navigation is present
Page Load and Layout › TC-ORBIT-05: page does not produce uncaught JS errors on load
Space-Themed Content Renders › TC-ORBIT-06: themed banner, hero, or canvas is visible
Space-Themed Content Renders › TC-ORBIT-07: content cards or feed items are displayed
Space-Themed Content Renders › TC-ORBIT-08: card titles are non-empty text
Space-Themed Content Renders › TC-ORBIT-09: author or creator info is displayed on content items
Space-Themed Content Renders › TC-ORBIT-10: timestamps or date indicators are shown
Section Navigation › TC-ORBIT-11: navigation tabs or links between sections are present
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › platform\orbit.spec.js:108:7 › Section Navigation › TC-ORBIT-11: navigation tabs or links between sections are present
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('[role="tab"], nav a, [role="tablist"] a').first() Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('[role="tab"], nav a, [role="tablist"] a').first()
109 | const tab = page.locator('[role="tab"], nav a, [role="tablist"] a').first(); 110 | if (!(await tab.isVisible({ timeout: 8000 }).catch(() => false))) return; > 111 | await expect(tab).toBeVisible(); | ^ 112 | }); 113 | 114 | test('TC-ORBIT-12: switching between tabs updates visible content', async ({ page }) => { at C:\claude-folder\webapp-testing\omre-webapp\tests\platform\orbit.spec.js:111:23
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\2026-06-13_11-29-36\artifacts\platform-orbit-Section-Nav-43fbb-etween-sections-are-present-chromium\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\2026-06-13_11-29-36\artifacts\platform-orbit-Section-Nav-43fbb-etween-sections-are-present-chromium\video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ..\test-results\2026-06-13_11-29-36\artifacts\platform-orbit-Section-Nav-43fbb-etween-sections-are-present-chromium\error-context.md

testcase.name: Section Navigation › TC-ORBIT-12: switching between tabs updates visible content
testcase.error:
[chromium] › platform\orbit.spec.js:114:7 › Section Navigation › TC-ORBIT-12: switching between tabs updates visible content
Test timeout of 45000ms exceeded.
Error: locator.click: Test timeout of 45000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('[role="tab"]').nth(1) - locator resolved to <button role="tab" type="button" tabindex="-1" data-state="active" aria-selected="true" data-slot="tabs-trigger" data-orientation="horizontal" data-radix-collection-item="" id="radix-_R_6lubsnp5babrdb_-trigger-foryou" aria-controls="radix-_R_6lubsnp5babrdb_-content-foryou" class="dark:data-[state=active]:text-foreground focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:outline-ring dark:data-[state=active]:border-input dark:data-[state=active]:bg-input/30 text-foreground dark:text-mut…>For You</button> - attempting click action - waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element was detached from the DOM, retrying
116 | const count = await tabs.count(); 117 | if (count < 2) return; > 118 | await tabs.nth(1).click(); | ^ 119 | await page.waitForTimeout(800); 120 | await expect(page.locator('main')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 5000 }); 121 | }); at C:\claude-folder\webapp-testing\omre-webapp\tests\platform\orbit.spec.js:118:23
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\2026-06-13_11-29-36\artifacts\platform-orbit-Section-Nav-f7ee2-abs-updates-visible-content-chromium\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\2026-06-13_11-29-36\artifacts\platform-orbit-Section-Nav-f7ee2-abs-updates-visible-content-chromium\video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ..\test-results\2026-06-13_11-29-36\artifacts\platform-orbit-Section-Nav-f7ee2-abs-updates-visible-content-chromium\error-context.md

testcase.name: Section Navigation › TC-ORBIT-13: orbit sub-section routes are navigable
